heading: Consent of States
label: 2009bb–9 Consent of States
text: Nothing in this subchapter requires any State to engage in or accept any program under this subchapter without the consent of the State.
notes: Codificationand made identical amendments to this section. The amendments by were repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246
